title: Niche playbook: motion-preset
description: Niche motion preset selection. Determines which Tier 2 motion patterns the build agent enables and which easing curves it uses. SOP 13 reads this; falls back to `restrained` if file is missing.

preset.description: restrained = premium easings only (cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) etc.), smaller hover deltas, slower stagger; energetic = overshoot/bounce easings (cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)), larger deltas, faster stagger; custom = use the overrides below.

tier2Enabled.description: Tier 2 patterns enabled for this niche. Stack maximum 2 per page to avoid overload.

honorsReducedMotion.description: Must be true. The build agent enforces prefers-reduced-motion regardless of preset.
